input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The jakarta.activation-api artifact is API-only; tests that exercise default MailcapCommandMap/MimetypesFileTypeMap implementation paths may hit missing com.sun.activation.registries classes unless they avoid those paths or use test doubles.

Adding com.sun.activation:jakarta.activation as a helper dependency would introduce duplicate jakarta.activation classes, so it should not be applied as deterministic setup without local Gradle evidence that it is necessary.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment setup is required; the 2.0.0 artifact has no external Maven dependencies and the javac failure is caused by stale javax.activation imports after the API package moved to jakarta.activation.
